# Context7 Query Prompts

Use these query shapes to refresh the source context before answering Livewire 4 Actions questions. Always keep the query scoped to `/websites/livewire_laravel_4_x`.

## Actions Overview
```text
Livewire 4 Actions documentation: public component methods as actions, wire:click, wire:submit, action parameters, Eloquent model action parameters, Laravel dependency injection in action signatures, event listener directives, key modifiers, event handler modifiers, custom wire:* events, $event, $refresh, preserving scroll, and action security. Return documented APIs, namespaces, modifiers, examples, and caveats only.
```

## Client And Magic Actions
```text
Livewire 4 Actions JavaScript documentation: Alpine $wire action calls, passing parameters to $wire actions, receiving action return values as promises, #[Json] for JavaScript-consumed actions, JavaScript actions with $js(), calling $js from Blade, Alpine, and PHP with $this->js(), class-based component @script wrappers, magic actions $parent, $set, $refresh, $toggle, $dispatch, $event, and action-related $wire object APIs. Return documented APIs and caveats only.
```

## Renderless And Async Actions
```text
Livewire 4 Actions render and concurrency documentation: #[Renderless], Livewire\Attributes\Renderless, $this->skipRender(), wire:click.renderless, .renderless, wire:click.async, #[Async], Livewire\Attributes\Async, request queueing, parallel execution, valid async use cases, async race-condition warnings, and JavaScript-only async results. Return documented syntax and warnings only.
```

## Confirmation And Loading States
```text
Livewire 4 Actions feedback documentation: wire:confirm, wire:confirm.prompt, confirmation messages, prompt expected input format, wire:loading, wire:loading.remove, wire:loading.class, wire:loading.class.remove, wire:loading.attr, wire:target for actions, multiple actions, action parameters, properties, wire:target.except, data-loading, Tailwind data-loading variants, CSS data-loading selectors, submit button disabling, and readonly form inputs. Return documented directives, modifiers, examples, and caveats only.
```

## Action Testing
```text
Livewire 4 testing documentation for actions: Pest and PHPUnit action tests, Livewire::test(), Livewire::actingAs(), set(), toggle(), call(), call() with parameters, refresh(), dispatch(), assertHasErrors(), assertForbidden(), assertUnauthorized(), assertRedirect(), assertRedirectToRoute(), assertDispatched(), assertNotDispatched(), assertJs(), assertNoJs(), and browser tests for action flows. Return documented testing helpers and examples only.
```
